messages.content: do you remember which game i love?
You love to play eFootball, Moksh.
great, give me some tips to imporve in efootball
To improve in eFootball, focus on mastering player switching, timing your tackles, and using the right formations. Also, practice your dribbling and shooting techniques, Moksh.
You're welcome, Moksh. I hope these tips help you improve your eFootball skills.
